mapper.update: UPDATE app_generation_task SET status = #{status}, started_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'GENERATING' AND started_at IS NULL THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE started_at END, finished_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'STOPPED') THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE finished_at END, duration_ms = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'STOPPED') THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MICROSECOND, COALESCE(started_at, queued_at), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) DIV 1000 ELSE duration_ms END, http_status = CASE WHEN #{httpStatus} IS NOT NULL THEN #{httpStatus} WHEN #{status} = 'SUCCESS' THEN 200 WHEN #{status} = 'STOPPED' THEN 499 WHEN #{status} = 'FAILED' THEN 500 ELSE http_status END, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = CASE WHEN #{errorMessage} IS NOT NULL AND #{errorMessage} != '' THEN #{errorMessage} WHEN #{errorCode} IS NULL OR #{errorCode} = '' THEN CASE WHEN #{status} = 'STOPPED' THEN 'STOPPED' ELSE error_message END ELSE #{errorCode} END, trace_id = COALESCE(#{traceId}, trace_id) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_generation_task WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'GENERATING') AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE app_generation_task SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
